PH

Pivotal Health

Data Engineer

Brisbane, QLD Full-time
Hybrid
Mid
3d ago 19 applicants

Build the pipelines that power our clinical analytics. You'll own ingestion, transformation, and serving for a fast-growing health platform.

Salary

$130,000 – $155,000

TypeFull-time
WorkstyleHybrid
LevelMid

Responsibilities

Design and operate ELT pipelines in dbt + Snowflake
Work with clinicians to model the right outcomes
Own data quality and SLAs

What we're looking for

3+ years in a data engineering role
Strong SQL + Python
dbt experience preferred

Perks & benefits

Hybrid (Brisbane)
Annual healthcare allowance
